description: Structured note pricer using the Spire collateral + swap framework. Prices capital-protected and partial-protection structured notes. For inflation-linked structured notes use index_linked.

required_fields.name: accrual_day_count
required_fields.description: Day count convention for the note leg

required_fields.name: collateral
required_fields.description: Collateral bond backing the structured note

fields.name: principal_amount
fields.description: Principal of the collateral bond (also accepted as 'principal')

fields.name: coupon_rate
fields.description: Fixed coupon rate of the collateral bond

fields.name: day_count
fields.description: Day count for the collateral accrual

fields.name: discount_curve_name
fields.description: Curve name to discount collateral cash flows

optional_fields.name: credit_spread_bp
optional_fields.description: Issuer spread on the note (basis points)

optional_fields.name: collateral_spread_bp
optional_fields.description: Additional spread applied to the collateral leg (basis points)

optional_fields.name: redemption
optional_fields.description: Final redemption amount or pct (default = par)

optional_fields.name: issuer_call
optional_fields.description: Set to 'Applicable' to enable a call schedule

optional_fields.name: autocall_trigger
optional_fields.description: Dict with trigger_level_pct, monte_carlo_paths, monte_carlo_vol for autocall simulation

optional_fields.name: valuation_mode
optional_fields.description: Which redemption scenario to use as NPV
